leadText: The Battleground (Japanese: しょうぶどころ Match Place) is a location in the Survival Area of the Battle Zone where Trainers come to battle each other.

sections.title: In the games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the games 1.1 Trainers 1.1.1 Gym Leaders 1.1.2 Stat Trainers In the games [ edit | edit source ] The Battleground is owned by Buck and appears only in Pokémon Platinum . After the Stark Mountain subquest with Team Galactic , the player can battle Gym Leaders and Multi Battle partners from earlier in the game. Gym Leaders can appear simultaneously in the Battleground, their respective Gyms, and possibly the Villa . The stat Trainers must have their quests cleared in order to be able to appear; at the minimum, this is guaranteed to include Cheryl and Buck, as the former's is required to complete the main storyline, and the latter's is required to complete the postgame storyline and gain access to the Battleground. Without trading with other games, Riley 's is also required as he gives the player the HM for Strength which is necessary to progress through the main story. Up to four of these Trainers appear each day and they can be battled only once a day. Resetting before entering the Battleground will change the Trainers who are inside. If the player saves the game while inside and changes the DS's clock to the next day, they may exit and reenter to find a new group; in this manner, the player may battle two sets of Trainers in the same day. However, if a Trainer appears in both groups, they may not be rebattled in the same day after reentering the Battleground in this way. According to Buck's grandfather, only Gym Leaders and those vouched for by them are allowed here. If the player attempts to enter before completing the Stark Mountain subquest, interacting with the door will produce the message: The door is shut tight. "Members only" is printed on it.
